title: JobSubmissionRequest
description: Payload sent from .NET Gateway API to the Python Agent Service to kick off processing.

jobId.description: Generated by the client when available, with Gateway generation as a backward-compatible fallback. Doubles as the idempotency key at the Gateway: if the same jobId is submitted again after a terminal result is persisted, the Gateway returns the existing result rather than reprocessing.

text.description: Extracted plain text of the uploaded document. Never raw binary.
